home.title: Home
home.desc: Customize the home screen hero section

about.title: About
about.desc: App info, version, and useful links

ui.appearance_desc: Customize the app's look and feel.
ui.scaling_desc: Adjust the overall size of UI elements. Smaller values fit more content on screen.

playback.title: Playback
playback.automatic_fallback_desc: Automatically switch to another player if playback fails
playback.auto_play_desc: Automatically play the first stream returned
playback.skip_intro_desc: Show a skip button during TV show intros
playback.skip_intro_info: When enabled, episode information (IMDb ID, season, episode) is sent to IntroDB to fetch intro timestamps.
playback.tunneled_desc: Use tunneled video playback mode for better performance on some devices
playback.audio_passthrough_desc: Enable audio passthrough for surround sound (recommended for TV)
playback.workarounds_desc: Apply compatibility workarounds for certain video formats
playback.match_frame_rate_desc: Automatically match screen refresh rate and resolution to video (supported TV devices only)
playback.software_decoding_desc: Use software decoder instead of hardware (may help with compatibility issues but uses more CPU, not recommended on low-end devices such as streaming sticks, set-top boxes and older phones). Disable this if you experience playback stuttering.
playback.video_stats_desc: Display a live stats overlay during playback
playback.preferred_audio_desc: The first available one is used
playback.preferred_subtitles_desc: Shown first in the subtitle selector

about.check_on_startup_desc: Show an update prompt when a new release is available
about.update_check_unavailable_desc: GitHub releases URL is not configured for this build.

addons.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}"?
addons.addons_info: Addons are installed globally across the app. You can activate or deactivate them specifically for this profile. Use the ↑↓ arrows on active addons to set the order they appear on Home, Search, and Stream List.
addons.visible_on_home_desc: Catalogs are visible on the Home screen
addons.use_for_subtitles_desc: Subtitles are fetched from this addon if available

simkl.instructions: Visit the URL below and enter the code to authorize DodoStream.
simkl.desc: Track your watch history. Powered by Simkl.
simkl.code_expired: The code has expired. Please try again.
simkl.sync_mode_import_desc: Pull watch history and watchlist from Simkl into DodoStream
simkl.sync_mode_export_desc: Export DodoStream history and watchlist to Simkl
simkl.sync_mode_full_desc: Sync history and watchlist in both directions
simkl.connection_failed_desc: Could not fetch Simkl user info. Please try again.
simkl.sync_failed_desc: Could not sync with Simkl. Check your connection.
simkl.connected_prompt: Connected as {{username}}. How would you like to start?
simkl.sync_from_desc: Pull your Simkl watch history and watchlist into DodoStream
simkl.sync_to_desc: Export your DodoStream history and watchlist to Simkl
simkl.sync_full_desc: Full synchronization of history and watchlist in both directions
simkl.clear_local_desc: Removes all local watch history before pulling from Simkl

home.continue_watching_desc: Display recently watched content at the top of the home screen
home.my_list_desc: Display your saved movies and shows on the home screen
home.show_hero_desc: Display a featured content carousel at the top of the home screen
home.hero_sources_desc: Configure which catalogs provide content for the hero section. Random items will be selected and refreshed every {{minutes}} minutes.

data.clear_history_desc: Remove all watch progress and history items for this profile
data.clear_history_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to clear your entire watch history and "Continue Watching" items for this profile? This action cannot be undone.
data.clear_list_desc: Remove all movies and shows saved to your list for this profile
data.clear_list_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to remove all items from "My List" for this profile? This action cannot be undone.
data.reset_simkl_desc: Clear Simkl connection and synchronization state for this profile
data.reset_simkl_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to reset your Simkl connection and sync cursors for this profile? You will need to reconnect your Simkl account.
data.profile_data_notice: These actions only affect the currently active profile. Local settings and other profiles will remain unchanged.

remoteControl.title: Remote Control
remoteControl.description: The remote control server starts automatically so you can manage addons from your phone or computer.
remoteControl.ip_fallback: The server is running on port {{port}}. Open the web UI on http://<your-device-ip>:{{port}}
remoteControl.ip_hint_ios: Find your iPhone/iPad IP: Settings > Wi-Fi > tap (i) next to your network > IP Address.
remoteControl.ip_hint_android: Find your device IP: Settings > Network & Internet > Wi-Fi > your network > IP Address.
remoteControl.footer: The server stops automatically when you close this panel.
remoteControl.manage_desc: Open Remote Control to sync from your phone

toast.pin_updated_msg: A new PIN has been generated.
toast.no_network_msg: Connect to a Wi-Fi network and try again.
